top_signals.title: Gold Slumps as US-Iran Strikes, Fed’s Waller Fuel Rate Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Gold dropped the most in more than two weeks as renewed US-Iran hostilities in the Middle East and remarks from a monetary policymaker fueled expectations that the Federal Reserve may raise interest rates to contain inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy
top_signals.summary: The United States Oil Fund (USO), the ETF that best tracks oil prices, offers equity options traders a liquid, accessible alternative to the complexities of the futures market.

top_signals.title: Calpers Notches 14.8% Return in Fiscal 2026, Driven By Stocks
top_signals.summary: The California Public Employees’ Retirement System reported a 14.8% gain for its latest fiscal year, with results driven by stocks and private equity.

top_signals.title: ICS Greek Branch and Alba Graduate Business School Successfully Complete the 6th Summer School “Shipping in Action”
top_signals.summary: The Institute of Chartered Shipbrokers (ICS) Greek Branch, in collaboration with Alba Graduate Business School, successfully completed the 6th Summer School “Shipping in Action”, held from 6 to 9 July 2026. The four-day programme brought together students from Greece and abroad for an immersive learning experience, combining academic lectures, company visits and cultural activities, offering ...

top_signals.title: Qatar suspends maritime navigation, marine activities amid heightened security concerns
top_signals.summary: Qatar’s Ministry of Transport on Sunday announced a temporary suspension of maritime navigation and all marine activities as a precautionary measure to safeguard public safety. In a statement, the ministry advised owners and users of all maritime vessels, including leisure boats, fishing boats, jet skis and other watercraft, to temporarily suspend sailing and all marine ...

top_signals.title: BW LPG Limited announces sale of BW Elm
top_signals.summary: BW LPG Limited is pleased to announce that its 52%-owned subsidiary, BW LPG India, has entered into an agreement to sell the 2007-built BW Elm for continued trading. On a 100% basis, the sale of BW Elm is expected to generate a net book gain of approximately US$36 million and net cash proceeds of around ...
